headline: AppLovin's Margin Strength Stands Out: What Investors Should Know
summary: APP's standout margins, 85% adjusted EBITDA and 66% net income, highlight the power of its high-margin software mix and disciplined costs despite a sharp stock pullback.

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock to Target This Week and 2 We Brush Off
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.
